basic_details.job_title: Maharaja Agrasen College Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Research Assistant and Field Investigator Posts
basic_details.short_information: Maharaja Agrasen College Research Assistant and Field Investigator Notification 2026 has been released on 11-05-2026 on the official website of Maharaja Agrasen College. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the Research Assistant and Field Investigator Recruitment 2026. Candidates who have Post-Graduate or Graduate qualification in any Social Science discipline with a minimum of 55% marks are eligible to apply for these Research Assistant and Field Investigator vacancies. The email application process for Research Assistant and Field Investigator Recruitment 2026 has started and

qualification.education_qualification: Post-Graduate in any Social Science discipline with minimum 55% marks, Graduate in any Social Science discipline with minimum 55% marks
qualification.details: Research Assistant: Post-Graduate in any Social Science discipline with a minimum of 55 % marks. Preference will be given to candidates with NET/M.Phil/Ph.D. Desirable: Ph.D Degree in Commerce & Management with specialisation in Finance, adequate knowledge of various data analysis tools (such as SPSS/Excel/nvivo etc), proficient in research report writing, past Experience as Research assistant and Research associate in any project. Field Investigator: Graduate in any Social Science discipline with a minimum of 55 % marks. Preference will be given to candidates with four-year graduation programme. Desirable: past Experience of research and data collection, belonging to or familiar with Himachal Pradesh, fluent English & Hindi.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Maharaja Agrasen College Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Maharaja Agrasen College recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Maharaja Agrasen College recruitment is 20th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches them before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Research Assistant and Field Investigator posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced by Maharaja Agrasen College for the positions of Research Assistant and Field Investigator. One post is for Research Assistant and two posts are for Field Investigator.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: For the Research Assistant position, candidates must have a Post-Graduate degree in any Social Science discipline with a minimum of 55% marks. Preference is given to those with NET/M.Phil/Ph.D.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification for the Field Investigator post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Field Investigator role, candidates need a Graduate degree in any Social Science discipline with a minimum of 55% marks. A four-year graduation program is preferred.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary range for these positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for both Research Assistant and Field Investigator posts will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 20,000/- to Rs. 37,000/-.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is via email. Candidates need to send their complete application along with required documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for applying?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive by Maharaja Agrasen College.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Research Assistant and Field Investigator positions will be based on an Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions of Research Assistant and Field Investigator are on a contract basis. This means the employment will be for a fixed tenure as per the terms of the contract.
